title: Short Eva related questions thread
wikitext:
[]: Short Eva-related questions thread             Quote Post by Mr. M » Tue Jun 15, 2021 4:16 pm [SOLVED]

[]: Anno and the 5 Evangelion Characters             Quote Post by Mr. M » Tue Jun 15, 2021 4:20 pm ]

[]: Mr. M's questions             Quote Post by Mr. M » Tue Jun 15, 2021 4:33 pm A friend of Mine needs to know who said these phrases and in which Rebuild movie were said. Can you help me? Nowadays men are only interested in themselves and that's it. This world is full of pleasant things that you do not yet know or even imagine. Try to have fun. Restoring inner serenity is a necessary virtue to win battles. [SOLVED]

[]: Re: Who said it?             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Tue Jun 15, 2021 5:07 pm Mr. M wrote: Nowadays men are only interested in themselves and that's it.

[]: Re: TV/Radio bits in Eva             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Tue Jun 15, 2021 5:23 pm Mr. M wrote: Hi there! In some episode of NGE there was on the tv/radio the news of a terroristic attack in Neo Tokyo 2 and in another a lover is left by his mate, bit I don't remember the episode in which it happened. Can you help me?

[]: Re: Who said it?             Quote Post by Mr. M » Tue Jun 15, 2021 5:43 pm Thank you so much! ❤

[]: Re: TV/Radio bits in Eva             Quote Post by Mr. M » Tue Jun 15, 2021 5:45 pm Thank tou immensvly! ❤

[]: Urgent: Who said it in Nadia?             Quote Post by Mr. M » Tue Jun 15, 2021 6:05 pm I need help: Who said these phrases in Secret of Blue Water? I don't want to believe only in science, but also in man. This stone connects the souls of all the Atlanteans together. Can you help me please?

[]: Re: Mr. M's questions             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Jun 15, 2021 7:04 pm We have decided to merge the various single questions threads into one. Mr. M, going forward please ask your questions in here. There is nothing wrong with creating threads to ask a question, but the volume at which you do it warrants giving them a dedicated place.

[]: Re: Who said it?             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Tue Jun 15, 2021 7:38 pm Mr. M wrote: Thank you so much! ❤

[]: Re: Mr. M's questions             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Jun 15, 2021 7:52 pm Unfortunately, the posting times are hardcoded into the posts, and short of messing with the database itself, there is no method of changing the order in which posts appear (at least none that I know of). And yeah, that is actually a good idea. I'll rename it accordingly.

[]: Re: Short Eva-related questions thread             Quote Post by Mr. M » Tue Jun 15, 2021 7:55 pm Sadly tho, my last question is about Secret of Blue Water. I'm trying so desperatly to find these phrases, but I can't!

[]: Re: Urgent: Who said it in Nadia?             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Tue Jun 15, 2021 8:21 pm ^ Any chance these lines are the same as an official English translation? By the way... Mr. M wrote: This stone connects the souls of all the Atlanteans together.

[]: Re: Short Eva-related questions thread             Quote Post by Mr. M » Tue Jun 15, 2021 8:38 pm That's it! Thank you! ❤❤❤
